outreach_draft.subject: Post-Judgment Gatekeeper Recovery — Offshore Fraud Judgment — Seeking Counsel
outreach_draft.body:
Dear Mr. Jeruchimowitz,

I am reaching out regarding a post-judgment recovery matter that aligns with your expertise in asset recovery, veil piercing, and fraudulent transfer litigation.

Our client holds an uncollected fraud judgment against an offshore foreign corporation. The judgment debtor has no reachable assets. The recovery strategy focuses on gatekeeper liability — pursuing the auditors, professional advisors, and financial institutions whose conduct enabled the fraud — using identified exposure as settlement leverage.

Your recognized practice in post-judgment proceedings, alter ego litigation, and asset recovery (Who's Who Legal — Asset Recovery) reflects direct alignment with this matter.

I would welcome a brief preliminary call to explore fit and mutual interest. No commitment implied. Case details available under mutual NDA.

Sincerely,
[SENDER_NAME]
Corporate Z | Judgment Monetization Group
